# I Love Digital

> A people-first digital studio on the Gold Coast, Queensland. We make websites, and Google simple. Modern websites, SEO and AI search (GEO), social media, and AI consulting for Queensland trades and service businesses.

## Services
- [Websites](https://ilovedigital.com.au/websites): Custom, fast, modern websites with brand identity, built to be found by Google and AI.
- [Search](https://ilovedigital.com.au/search): Technical, on-page, and local SEO plus Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO).
- [Social](https://ilovedigital.com.au/social): Done-for-you social media across Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.
- [AI](https://ilovedigital.com.au/ai): AI strategy, workflow automation, and fractional CTO direction.

## Key pages
- [Work](https://ilovedigital.com.au/work): Case studies from Queensland businesses.
- [About](https://ilovedigital.com.au/about): Founder Jerrell Niu — two decades in product, technology, and business.
- [Insights](https://ilovedigital.com.au/insights): Guides on websites, SEO, and AI search.
- [Contact](https://ilovedigital.com.au/contact): Book a 15-minute call or request a free website audit.

## Notes
- Based on the Gold Coast, serving Queensland and Australia.
- Pricing is quoted per project in Australian dollars; onboarding fees are separate from retainers.
